issues.description: SearchDeck filter is completely wrong. Should filter by type {Red-Haired Pirates}, exclude card name [Come On!! We'll Fight You!!], and search top 5 cards only—not by cost. Current filter uses maxCost which is incorrect.
Action should be SearchDeck with proper type filter, not cost-based. Must specify: kind='ByType', type='{Red-Haired Pirates}', excludeName='[Come On!! We'll Fight You!!]', searchCount=5, maxResults=1
Second effect (Trigger → DrawCard) is spurious and not in card text. Card only has one effect: the search action on play. Remove entirely.
Missing action to handle remaining 4 cards: they must be placed at bottom of deck in any order. Current DSL does not reflect this ordering mechanic.
